ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The format of the time to insert. (default: HH:mm)
ast.target: 要插入的时间格式。（默认：HH:mm）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Insert the date in addition to the time.
ast.target: 除了时间外，还插入日期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The format of the date to insert. (default: YYYY-MM-DD)
ast.target: 要插入的日期格式。（默认：YYYY-MM-DD）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn this on if you don't want to use the Doing status for subtasks (indented checkboxes)
ast.target: 如果您不想对子任务（缩进的复选框）使用“进行中”状态，请启用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If the start and end time are the same, delay the end time by 1 minute.
ast.target: 如果开始和结束时间相同，则将结束时间延迟 1 分钟。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If the end date is the same as the start date, do not insert end date to avoid duplication.
ast.target: 如果结束日期与开始日期相同，则不插入结束日期以避免重复。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: CSS classes for track
ast.target: 轨道的 CSS 类

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Time format
ast.target: 时间格式

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enable date inserting
ast.target: 启用日期插入

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Date format
ast.target: 日期格式

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enable doing status
ast.target: 启用进行中状态

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Separator
ast.target: 分隔符

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Disable doing status for sub tasks
ast.target: 禁用子任务的进行中状态

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Omit end date on same date
ast.target: 同日期时省略结束日期

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No task found
ast.target: 未找到任务

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Time format should not contain spaces.
ast.target: 时间格式不应包含空格。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Separator should not contain special characters.
ast.target: 分隔符不应包含特殊字符。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Cycle task status
ast.target: 循环任务状态

ast.name: name
ast.source: Duplicate as new task
ast.target: 复制为新任务

ast.name: name
ast.source: End current task and insert duplicated on the next line
ast.target: 结束当前任务并在下一行插入复制的任务

ast.name: text
ast.source: The following special characters are not allowed: ^ $ * + ? . [ ] { } | \
ast.target: 不允许使用以下特殊字符：^ $ * + ? . [ ] { } | \\

ast.name: text
ast.source: Preview inserted datetime:
ast.target: 预览插入的日期时间：
